data.title: AI-driven scams surged by 500% in 2025, with $35B crypto lost to scammers as fraudsters utilized AI for operations.
data.description: According to TRM Labs, approximately $35 billion worth of cryptocurrency was transferred to fraudulent addresses in the previous year. This significant amount was sent as scammers utilized advanced technologies like artificial intelligence to streamline their illicit activities, showcasing a more professional and organized approach to perpetrating scams.
A CHINA PROPERTY STOCK GAUGE EXTENDS GAINS TO 8.1%

data.title: Tesla retained $1.008 billion in Bitcoin in Q4, with a paper loss of $307 million. Musk-led company saw 23% decrease.
data.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) announced in its recent earnings report that it retained its Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) holdings throughout the fourth quarter. As of December 31, Tesla held approximately $1.008 billion in digital assets, representing a 23% decrease from the previous quarter. The company disclosed paper losses of $307 million on its cryptocurrency investments, marking a reversal from two consecutive quarters of gains. While Tesla does not provide a detailed breakdown of its specific cryptocurrency holdings, analytics firm Arkham Intelligence suggests that its portfolio is entirely composed of Bitcoin. This recent development was outlined in detail in the earnings report released after the close of trading.

data.title: Bybit dominates XAUT spot trading with 16% market share, becoming top exchange with 15.75% XAUT trading volume.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on January 28, 2026, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, revealed its achievement of being the top centralized exchange for spot trading of Tether Gold (XAUT). Bybit now dominates around 15.75% of the total XAUT trading volume, solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Bitcoin is stagnant near $90,000 due to heavy crypto options activity, with traders opting for hedged positions over leverage.
data.description: Increased trading activity and a large amount of open positions at specific strike prices are causing Bitcoin to remain within a certain range. Traders are choosing hedged positions rather than leverage, resulting in a lack of significant movement in the market.
Copper on SHFE Hits Record High of 105,500 Yuan, Up 4.16%

data.title: WuXi Biologics (2269.HK) and Sinorda Biomedicine partner to develop SND006, a bispecific antibody.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Shanghai, WuXi Biologics (stock symbol: 2269.HK), a prominent international Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO), partnered with Sinorda Biomedicine to collaboratively work on SND006, a groundbreaking drug. This strategic alliance aims to combine resources for the development and production of SND006, marking a significant step in the pharmaceutical industry.

data.title: Celestica (CLS) fell 5.28% to $327.01 after reporting 4Q 2025 revenue of $3.65B, beating guidance. 2026 revenue outlook raised to $17B.
data.description: Shares of Celestica Inc. (NYSE: CLS) experienced a decline of 5.28% in after-hours trading, reaching $327.01 following the release of the company's fourth-quarter earnings report and 2026 guidance update. In Q4 of 2025, the Toronto-based data center infrastructure provider saw a significant increase in revenue, reaching $3.65 billion, a 44% rise from $2.55 billion in the previous year. This exceeded the company's projected revenue range of $3.325 billion to $3.575 billion. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) surpassed expectations at $1.89, compared to the forecasted range of $1.65 to $1.81, while EPS under generally accepted accounting principles reached $2.31, up from $1.29 in Q4 of 2024. Additionally, the adjusted operating margin grew to 7.7% from 6.8% in the previous year. CEO Rob Mionis revealed ambitious expansion plans as Celestica announced an increase in its 2026 revenue outlook to $17 billion from $16 billion, along with an upward adjustment in adjusted EPS guidance.

data.title: Rare earth stocks plummeted after Trump administration cancels plan to establish price floors.
data.description: Stocks in the rare earth industry experienced a significant decline in value following a report indicating that the Trump administration will no longer ensure price stability. The drop in rare earth stocks was particularly notable, with prices tumbling overnight. This development, as reported by Reuters, has caused uncertainty within the market as the previous guarantee of price floors is no longer in place. This news has led to late declines in the sector, impacting investors and contributing to a shift in market dynamics.
Singapore Sovereign Fund GIC Forms Investment Partnership with Sony Music

data.title: The SEC classifies tokenized assets as securities before technology, emphasizing investor protections amid uncertainties over crypto regulation.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced that the use of blockchain technology for recordkeeping does not change investor protections. However, the SEC has not yet determined how products native to the crypto industry align with current laws. This statement comes from the regulator as they navigate the intersection of innovative technologies with traditional financial regulations. The SEC's acknowledgment highlights the need for further clarity regarding the oversight of blockchain-based systems in financial markets.

data.title: Hyundai Chairman Chung Kisun discusses cooperation with PM Modi, including shipbuilding projects; sees India as key partner.
data.description: Chairman Chung Kisun was invited by Prime Minister Modi to a high-level roundtable meeting where they discussed collaboration in commercial and naval shipbuilding projects, along with port crane projects. They also plan to work on joint shipyard development. This partnership is crucial as India is a significant component of their strategy to diversify overseas production. This collaboration is expected to strengthen ties between the two countries and enhance economic growth.

data.title: UMG executives honored with prestigious awards on Billboard's 2026 Power 100 list. Chairman & CEO Sir Lucian Grainge named #1 for 8th time.
data.description: Jody Gerson, Chairman & CEO of Universal Music Publishing Group (UMPG), has been recognized as Executive of the Decade. Additionally, Sir Lucian Grainge, Chairman & CEO of Universal Music Group (UMG), has been ranked first on the 2026 Power List and acknowledged for an unprecedented eighth occasion. The honor was given in Santa Monica, California on January 28, 2026. UMG, a global music powerhouse, is at the forefront of the industry.

data.title: Storelocal Storage opens Film Row facility in Oklahoma City, offering fully automated, climate-controlled storage.
data.description: Located in Oklahoma City, Storelocal Storage Film Row stands out as the sole fully automated, indoor climate-controlled self-storage facility in the area. Making waves in the industry, Storelocal is recognized for its innovative and customer-focused approach to storage solutions. The announcement was made on January 28, 2026, showcasing the company's commitment to providing top-notch services to its patrons.

data.title: QureBio Ltd. will showcase Q-1802 Phase II results at ASCO 2026, focusing on biopharmaceuticals for cancer treatment.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, QureBio Ltd., a clinical-stage biotech firm, disclosed details in a 2026 ASCO abstract. The company specializes in developing bispecific antibodies and other engineered Biopharmaceuticals to address cancer, inflammation, and various serious disorders.
